title: KP RADIO BROADCAST 4/15/26
message: We got another broadcast for ya, folks! TOMORROW, 4/15/26 @ 9:00 AM PST. Its gonna be another all electronic set. Should be a blast! If you want to know the time in your local timezone, check out https://kpradio.net ! You can even add the schedule to your google calendar! https://calendar.google.com/calendar/embed?src=97cdb0276a84ba2f8b8e7c72ae3fc32c0695c09a6d866abb25c596cb4572cb1e%40group.calendar.google.com

title: KP RADIO REVIVAL BROADCAST APRIL 11TH @ 12:30PM PST!
message: KP Radio will return to regularly scheduled broadcasts, starting with the KP RADIO REVIVAL BROADCAST on april 11th at 12:30PM PST! Check the calendar to see the broadcast time in your local timezone!
